spec.description: Production triage view for Codex Pooler runtime health, memory pressure, gateway admission, stream usage completeness, quota cycle decisions, HTTP traffic, database query pressure, admin stats dashboard reloads, request-log reloads, and restart evidence.
Total, CPU, and IO scheduler queues. Sudden growth usually means the VM is saturated or blocked on external work.
spec.title: BEAM Run Queue

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, pod) (rate(phoenix_endpoint_stop_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

topk(8, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route) (rate(phoenix_router_dispatch_stop_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) and on (route) (sum by (route) (rate(phoenix_router_dispatch_stop_duration_seconds_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0))

spec.description: Top active routes by p95 latency. The active-route filter avoids stale NaN/empty legend rows when a route has no observations in the current interval.
spec.title: Slowest Routes p95

spec.expr: sum by (buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_oversized_count_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_oversized_count{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_truncated_count_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_truncated_count{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_oversized_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_truncated_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))
sum by (pod) (max by (pod, name) (increase(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: Current kube-state-metrics lastState.terminated reason for live pods only. Deleted pod history is covered by restart and OOM panels, not this table.
spec.title: Current Pods Last Terminated Reason

spec.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (pod) (rate(phoenix_endpoint_stop_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
topk(10, sum by (source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: Top Ecto query sources by safe source and SQL command. Source falls back to a sanitized table identifier for raw SQL when available.
spec.title: Hot Query Sources

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_total_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_query_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, pod) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_queue_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

clamp_min(max by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}) - on (pod) max by (pod) (vm_memory_total_bytes{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}), 0)

spec.description: Container working set not accounted for by BEAM total memory. Use this to separate BEAM heap/binary growth from native allocator, libc, NIF, or cgroup accounting pressure.
spec.title: Cgroup Minus BEAM

spec.description: Cgroup memory categories from cAdvisor. RSS rising with flat BEAM memory points outside normal BEAM heap attribution.
spec.title: Container RSS / Cache

spec.expr: max((max by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}) / max by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", resource="memory", exported_container="app"})))

sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

spec.description: CPU throttling can stretch request lifetimes and queues, increasing memory retained by in-flight requests.
spec.title: CPU Throttling Ratio

spec.description: App, worker, and scheduler cgroup memory in one view. App Prometheus metrics are scraped from the app service; worker/scheduler visibility here comes from Kubernetes cgroup metrics.
spec.title: Workload Memory by Component

spec.description: App container CPU usage in cores. Correlate CPU spikes with request rate, DB query pressure, run queue, and admission queueing.
spec.title: CPU Usage

spec.description: Low-cardinality request outcome rate. Use this to separate traffic growth from error storms.
spec.title: HTTP Status Class Rate

spec.description: Local gateway bulkhead pressure by route class and transport. Queue/reject/timeout spikes show admission backpressure before memory climbs.
spec.title: Admission Events

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route_class, transport) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_admission_dequeued_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route_class, transport) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_admission_timeout_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: Time requests spent waiting in local admission queues before execution or timeout.
spec.title: Admission Queue Time p95

spec.expr: sum by (pod, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}", source="unknown"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Source-less queries that could not be mapped to a safe Ecto source or table identifier. Use this to spot unclassified raw SQL or telemetry source-attribution gaps.
spec.title: Unknown Query Rate

spec.description: SQL command mix across repository queries. Useful for spotting unexpected write or transaction churn during incidents.
spec.title: Query Command Mix

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_queue_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: Database connection checkout pressure by safe source and command.
spec.title: Repo Queue Time by Source p95

spec.expr: sum by () (max by (pod, name) (increase(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app"}[30m])))
max by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", resource="memory", exported_container="app"})
sum by (stage, window, scope) (rate(codex_pooler_admin_stats_reload_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Admin stats LiveView reload scheduling, coalescing, cancellation, and execution rate by window and scope. Coalesced spikes mean a page is already waiting on one debounced reload.
spec.title: Admin Stats Reload Rate

spec.expr: sum by (outcome, window, scope) (rate(codex_pooler_admin_stats_dashboard_build_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Full admin stats dashboard builds by outcome, selected time window, and scope. This shows the reload work that can drive read-model DB pressure from open admin pages.
spec.title: Admin Stats Dashboard Build Rate

spec.expr: sum by (usage_status, usage_source, downstream_transport, upstream_transport) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_finalization_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Successful stream finalization rate. Compare usage_unknown against usage_known without request, account, model, or payload labels.
spec.title: Stream Usage Completeness Rate

spec.expr: sum by (scope, decision, source) (rate(codex_pooler_quota_cycle_decision_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Quota cycle refresh, confirmation, candidate, rejection, and superseded-primary rejection rate. Repeated candidate decisions indicate a convergence loop without exposing account identity.
spec.title: Quota Cycle Decision Rate

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, outcome, window, scope) (rate(codex_pooler_admin_stats_dashboard_build_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: p95 duration for full admin stats dashboard builds. Pair spikes here with hot query source and DB queue panels to identify expensive stats reload paths.
spec.title: Admin Stats Dashboard Build p95

spec.description: Admin request-log LiveView reload rate by bounded stage and scope. Use this to separate first load, filter patch, and event-refresh pressure without tagging pool ids, models, request ids, users, paths, params, or API key prefixes.
spec.title: Admin Request Logs Reload Rate

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, stage, scope) (rate(codex_pooler_admin_request_logs_reload_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: p95 admin request-log reload duration by bounded stage and scope. Pair spikes with DB queue, hot safe query source, and pg_stat_statements evidence when validating request-log read-path remediation.
spec.title: Admin Request Logs Reload p95

links.title: Kubernetes pod details
links.tooltip: Open the generic pod dashboard for the same namespace/pod selection

spec.title: Codex Pooler / Runtime Triage
